bio: Software developer with 2 years of production experience building internal tools, real-time systems, and customer-facing web applications. Core stack: React/Next.js, Vue/Nuxt.js, TypeScript.
I've shipped features used daily by real users across sales, operations, and customer communication workflows — from ERP dashboards to bilingual landing pages reaching 90+ countries.
I care about the details — smooth interactions, readable code, and interfaces that just work. I'm comfortable owning a feature from concept to deployment.
